All Classes and Interfaces

Classes
Class
Description
AddPartController
Controller class for the Add Part Screen of the Inventory Management System.
AddProductController
Controller class for the Add Product Screen of the Inventory Management System.
InHouse
InHouse Part (Subclass of Part).
Inventory
Handles the inventory lists for the program, as well as part and product list manipulations.
Main
Starting position for the entire program and handles any changes to the stage/scene.
MainpageController
Controller class for the Main Page of the Inventory Management System.
ModifyPartController
Controller class for the Modify Part Screen of the Inventory Management System.
ModifyProductController
Controller class for the Modify Product Screen of the Inventory Management System.
Outsourced
Outsourced Part (Subclass of Part).
Part
 
Product
Product Object Class.
